text.title: Versioned Agent-Memory Files (decisions / patterns / mistakes) Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: wire-agent-load
step.action: Add @<path> include directives so memory loads on start.

step.name: wire-secret-scan
step.action: Add gitleaks/trufflehog hook covering memory dir.

step.name: set-prune-cadence
step.action: Schedule quarterly review + archive of old entries.
